headline: Canadian National Secures Long-Term Growth Through PlasCred Project
summary: CNI backs PlasCred's proposed Neos recycling facility with a long-term lease, leveraging rail infrastructure to cut costs and support circular economy goals.

raw.headline: Canadian National Secures Long-Term Growth Through PlasCred Project
raw.summary: CNI backs PlasCred's proposed Neos recycling facility with a long-term lease, leveraging rail infrastructure to cut costs and support circular economy goals.

headline: ALGT Issues Bullish Q2 View on Air-Travel Demand, Lower Fuel Costs
summary: Allegiant updates Q2 outlook as strong air-travel demand, lower June fuel costs and the Sun Country deal lift adjusted EPS expectations.

raw.headline: ALGT Issues Bullish Q2 View on Air-Travel Demand, Lower Fuel Costs
raw.summary: Allegiant updates Q2 outlook as strong air-travel demand, lower June fuel costs and the Sun Country deal lift adjusted EPS expectations.

headline: RYAAY Refines Family Seating Policy While Maintaining Low-Fare Model
summary: Ryanair updates its family seating policy, offering free adjacent seats after check-in while keeping paid advance seat selection for preferred locations.

raw.headline: RYAAY Refines Family Seating Policy While Maintaining Low-Fare Model
raw.summary: Ryanair updates its family seating policy, offering free adjacent seats after check-in while keeping paid advance seat selection for preferred locations.
